title: Settings Page
content:
## Settings Page

This page is a placeholder for the user's account and preferences settings within the DocMed application.

### Purpose

The primary purpose of this page is to provide a dedicated section for users to manage their profile, application settings, and any other relevant preferences.

### Key Exports/Functions/Props

*   **`SettingsPage`**: This is the main React functional component that renders the settings page.

### Usage

This component is intended to be rendered as part of the application's routing, likely at the `/dashboard/settings` path. Currently, it displays a "Settings coming soon." message, indicating that the functionality is under development.

```tsx
// Example of how this component might be imported and used in a routing setup:

import SettingsPage from './app/dashboard/settings/page';

// ... in your routing configuration ...

<Route path="/dashboard/settings" element={<SettingsPage />} />

// ...
```
